'''sathowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ignitability|ignitability]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-th-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ignitability|ignitability]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sathowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sætheweth|sætheweth]] || [[word:sæthewej|sæthewej]] || [[word:sæthewesh|sæthewesh]] || [[word:sæthewe|sæthewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sathothowoth|sathothowoth]] || [[word:sathothowoj|sathothowoj]] || [[word:sathothowosh|sathothowosh]] || [[word:sathothowo|sathothowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sathowoth|sathowoth]] || [[word:sathowoj|sathowoj]] || [[word:sathowosh|sathowosh]] || [[word:sathowo|sathowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sathofwofth|sathofwofth]] || [[word:sathofwofj|sathofwofj]] || [[word:sathofwofsh|sathofwofsh]] || [[word:sathofwof|sathofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sathowotho|sathowotho]] || [[word:sathowojo|sathowojo]] || [[word:sathowosho|sathowosho]] || [[word:sathowoko|sathowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sathowoth|sathowoth]] || [[word:sathowoj|sathowoj]] || [[word:sathowosh|sathowosh]] || [[word:sathowo|sathowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sathowothol|sathowothol]] || [[word:sathowojol|sathowojol]] || [[word:sathowoshol|sathowoshol]] || [[word:sathowokol|sathowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sathowoothotho|sathowoothotho]] || [[word:sathowoojojo|sathowoojojo]] || [[word:sathowooshosho|sathowooshosho]] || [[word:sathowooko|sathowooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sathowothon|sathowothon]] || [[word:sathowojon|sathowojon]] || [[word:sathowoshon|sathowoshon]] || [[word:sathowokon|sathowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sathowothooro|sathowothooro]] || [[word:sathowojooro|sathowojooro]] || [[word:sathowoshooro|sathowoshooro]] || [[word:sathowokooro|sathowokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
